name: Web Rhythm Game UI
description: Step 31: Track Performance Optimization and Input Fixes. Swapped out the expensive moving `background-position` CSS property for a hardware-accelerated `translateY` transform on a smaller clipping wrapper to drastically improve scrolling frame rates on PC and mobile. Also added `pointer-events: none` to the CSS track element and `onContextMenu` prevention on the canvas so right-clicking or holding keys doesn't trigger the browser menu.
